name: Curried Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your favorite mushrooms (oyster, morel, porcini, etc.).
2. In a bowl, combine the boiling water and dried mushrooms.
3. Set aside.
4. Preheat a heavy stockpot over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
5. Spray the pot twice with vegetable oil spray.
6. Add the leeks and sauté for about 3 minutes, stirring constantly until translucent.
7. Add the flour and curry powder; stir with a wooden spoon until leeks are well coated.
8. Stir in milk and bouillon cube. Increase heat to high and cook just until bubbles form around the edge.
9. Reduce heat to low. Whisk ingredients until thoroughly combined.
10. Stir in fresh mushrooms and cook until soup reaches desired thickness.
11. Remove reconstituted mushrooms from soaking liquid, strain, squeeze excess moisture, and chop roughly.
12. Add chopped mushrooms to the pot and cook for 1 minute more.
13. Remove from heat, stir in sherry, and garnish with chopped chervil.
